name: MaterialMarketSizesItemEnumerator
summary: The MaterialMarketSizesItemEnumerator class allows to loop through the items defined in XS_PROFDB\marketsizes.dat file.

methods.name: MoveNext
methods.summary: Moves to the next item in the MaterialMarketSizesItemEnumerator.

methods.name: Reset
methods.summary: Resets the MaterialMarketSizesItemEnumerator to the beginning.

properties.name: Current
properties.summary: Returns a MaterialMarketSizesItem instance with the current index.
